summary: 7 film announcements, 8 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Price Of Peace
film.talent: Guy Pearce, Jared Harris, Merab Ninidze, Mia Threapleton, Danny Huston
film.announcement: Mia Threapleton and Danny Huston join the cast as filming begins in London.

film.title: Grayson 'The Professor' Boucher Biopic
film.announcement: Deon Taylor to direct biopic on streetball star Grayson 'The Professor' Boucher.

film.title: Ally
film.talent: Bong Joon Ho (director), Bradley Cooper, Ayo Edebiri (voice cast)
film.announcement: Bong Joon Ho's first animated feature sells globally to Pathé with voice cast including Bradley Cooper and Ayo Edebiri.

film.title: The Most Serious Fart
film.announcement: AI-assisted animated movie produced by Utopai Studios with writer from Not Another Teen Movie.

film.title: Growth of the Soil
film.announcement: Hans Petter Moland's film picked up by Beta Cinema ahead of Toronto premiere.

film.title: The Two Week Wait
film.talent: Daniel Ings, Jessica Brown Findlay; Olivia Grant (director)
film.announcement: Daniel Ings and Jessica Brown Findlay star in Olivia Grant's directorial debut.

film.title: Bad Karaoke
film.announcement: Horror-comedy debuts trailer ahead of Tubi FrightFest premiere.

tv.title: Afterlife With Archie
tv.announcement: Series based on Archie comic ordered by Disney+ with Halloween 2027 premiere date, reuniting Riverdale team.

tv.title: Guilty Creatures
tv.talent: Julia Garner, Lewis Pullman; Tomorrow Studios (production)
tv.announcement: Lewis Pullman joins Julia Garner in Apple TV+ thriller series from Tomorrow Studios.

tv.title: The Earliest Show
tv.talent: Kevin Carroll, Henry Winkler, Ryan Gaul, Brandon Scott Jones
tv.announcement: Revival greenlit at Amplify Pictures with Kevin Carroll, Henry Winkler, Ryan Gaul, and Brandon Scott Jones joining cast.

tv.title: The Portrait of a Lady
tv.talent: Nell Tiger Free, Gemma Arterton, Bill Nighy, Jim Sturgess, Miranda Richardson
tv.announcement: PBS Masterpiece, BBC, and Fox adapting Henry James novel with ensemble cast.

tv.title: A Different World
tv.announcement: Sequel series drops first look at new generation of Hillman students with Dwayne Wayne returning.

tv.title: Grim Death and Bill the Electrocuted Criminal
tv.talent: Mike Mignola, Thomas E. Sniegoski (based on their novel)
tv.announcement: TV series in development based on supernatural novel by Hellboy creator Mike Mignola and Thomas E. Sniegoski.

tv.title: Happy Hour
tv.announcement: Kelsey Cook sets stand-up special at Netflix.

tv.title: The Dressing Room
tv.announcement: Eric McCormack to guest star in season 2.
